ReferAndEarn.subtitle: Invite other businesses to join our vibrant marketplace. When they subscribe using your referral code, both of you get free bonus days added to your subscription!
ReferAndEarn.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to start earning free subscription extensions for your business.
ReferAndEarn.step1Desc: Find your unique referral code in your Partner Dashboard and share it with your network.
ReferAndEarn.step2Desc: When they sign up for a Partner subscription, they enter your code at checkout.
ReferAndEarn.step3Desc: You both get bonus subscription days added automatically to your accounts!
ReferAndEarn.rewardStructureSubtitle: The longer the subscription plan your friend chooses, the bigger the reward for both of you! There is no limit to how many businesses you can refer.
ReferAndEarn.ctaSubtitle: Join our platform today, grab your referral code, and start growing your network while earning free subscription days.

PartnershipHowItWorks.heroSubtitle: From sign-up to your first sale — here's everything you need to know about launching your store and reaching thousands of buyers.
PartnershipHowItWorks.stepsSubtitle: Click any step to explore the details.
PartnershipHowItWorks.perksSubtitle: Agnipengal gives you the tools, community, and platform to build a real business.
PartnershipHowItWorks.testimonialQuote: Within 3 months of joining Agnipengal, I went from selling at local fairs to receiving orders from across India. The platform is simple, the support is real.
PartnershipHowItWorks.faqSubtitle: Still have questions? We're here to help.
PartnershipHowItWorks.ctaTitle: Join Thousands of Women Selling on Agnipengal
PartnershipHowItWorks.ctaSubtitle: Your store. Your prices. Your customers. Get started today by choosing a subscription plan.
PartnershipHowItWorks.step0Desc: Sign up as a vendor partner in minutes. Pick a subscription plan that fits your stage to unlock every feature from day one.
PartnershipHowItWorks.step0Detail0: Fill in your basic details and store name
PartnershipHowItWorks.step0Detail2: No setup fee, no hidden charges
PartnershipHowItWorks.step1Desc: Your own branded storefront — complete with a unique URL, logo, banner, and bio. Customise it to tell your brand story to thousands of buyers.
PartnershipHowItWorks.step1Detail1: Upload logo, banner, and store description
PartnershipHowItWorks.step2Desc: Add unlimited products with photos, descriptions, pricing, and inventory. Our intuitive dashboard makes listing as simple as posting on social media.
PartnershipHowItWorks.step2Detail0: Bulk upload or add one by one
PartnershipHowItWorks.step2Detail2: Products go live instantly after approval
PartnershipHowItWorks.step3Desc: Your products appear across Agnipengal's marketplace, category pages, and search results — reaching buyers actively looking for handmade and artisan products.
PartnershipHowItWorks.step3Detail0: Featured on category and deal pages
PartnershipHowItWorks.step4Desc: Receive orders, pack them, and ship directly to customers. Earnings are tracked in your dashboard and settled to your bank on a regular cycle.
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq0Q: How much does it cost to become a vendor?
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq0A: Choose a subscription plan that suits your business size. There are zero setup fees and no per-transaction commissions beyond your subscription.
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq1Q: Do I need a GST number to sell on Agnipengal?
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq1A: Not necessarily for getting started. However, for higher-volume selling and to comply with Indian tax laws, a GST registration is recommended. Our team can guide you through this as you grow.
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq2Q: How do customers pay, and when do I get my money?
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq2A: Customers pay securely via Razorpay (UPI, cards, net-banking). Your earnings are tracked in the vendor dashboard and settled to your registered bank account on a regular cycle.
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq3Q: Can I sell handmade as well as resold products?
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq3A: Agnipengal is built for women entrepreneurs — including artisans, home-based sellers, and small-business owners. You can list handmade, self-manufactured, or curated resold products.
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq4Q: How do orders and shipping work?
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq4A: When a customer places an order, you receive a notification in your vendor dashboard. You pack the order and ship it using any courier of your choice. You update the tracking number in the dashboard so the customer can track delivery.
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq5Q: Is there any support if I get stuck?
PartnershipHowItWorks.faq5A: Yes! Our vendor support team is available via the in-app support ticket system. Premium plan subscribers get priority response times.
PartnershipHowItWorks.perk0Desc: Network, learn, and grow alongside thousands of like-minded women sellers.
PartnershipHowItWorks.perk1Desc: Track views, orders, revenue, and customer behaviour in one clean dashboard.
PartnershipHowItWorks.perk2Desc: All transactions processed securely via Razorpay — zero fraud risk on your end.
PartnershipHowItWorks.perk3Title: Go Live in Under an Hour
PartnershipHowItWorks.perk3Desc: From signup to your first product listing in less than 60 minutes.
PartnershipHowItWorks.perk4Desc: Real humans ready to help you via our support ticket system.
PartnershipHowItWorks.perk5Desc: Top vendors get spotlighted on the homepage, deals, and category pages.
